blocking_items: Stage-1 RL / PD gains, armature, and action scale
Stage-1 RL / Domain randomization table S2
VAE / Conditional VAE input and architecture table S5
Diffusion / State-latent representation and data collection
Guidance / Classifier guidance and task costs
Training permission / No long downstream training from weak teacher
claim_level: audit_only; no training; no video success claim

interpretation.why_current_videos_can_fail: The appendix matrix still blocks native MuJoCo observation/action/material deployment and downstream training from weak teacher data. These are sufficient explanations for forward-leaning or generic standing videos even when reference replay is continuous.

allowed_next_work: use the MuJoCo no-action-clipping ctrlrange patch in future no-root-assist adapter probes
teacher checkpoint quality selection with done/error/continuity gates
paper-contract hybrid state-latent dataset regeneration after teacher gate

rows.observed_in_current_project: Official tracking config preserves command, anchor pos/orientation, base velocities, joint state, and last action.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Before MuJoCo PPO/video claims, compare each MuJoCo observation term numerically with IsaacLab observation_manager.
rows.training_impact: A wrong observation frame/order can make a good checkpoint output posture-like garbage.

rows.claim_boundary: Approximate or clipped action videos remain diagnostic.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: theta_sp=theta0+alpha*a; setpoints intentionally not clipped by joint kinematic limits.
rows.item: Normalized PD action and no kinematic clipping
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Resolve MuJoCo ctrlrange/action-scale compatibility before trusting PPO/VAE/diffusion action videos.
rows.training_impact: Ctrlrange clipping can shrink or distort ankle/leg actions, producing tiny steps or leaning poses.

rows.claim_boundary: Reward alignment does not imply current teacher success.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Body pos/orientation/linear velocity/angular velocity stds 0.3/0.4/1.0/3.14; weights 1; optional anchor weight 0.5; action/joint/contact penalties -0.1/-10/-0.1.
rows.observed_in_current_project: Official tracking config contains these reward terms, stds, and weights.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Keep reward components unchanged for paper-contract teacher training unless a row records an ablation.
rows.training_impact: Reward formula is not the first suspected bug; teacher quality failure likely comes from data/runtime/checkpoint quality or adapter mismatch.

rows.claim_boundary: Public-code detail is acceptable if documented, but current reset-heavy rollouts cannot seed downstream training.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Anchor/EE z error threshold 0.25 m and anchor orientation threshold 0.8 rad.
rows.observed_in_current_project: Official public code uses z-only anchor/EE checks and projected-gravity anchor orientation threshold.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Gate every teacher checkpoint by done rate, episode length, body error, joint error, and continuous motion_time_steps.
rows.training_impact: High non-timeout done rates directly poison teacher rollout, VAE, and diffusion training.

rows.claim_boundary: Official source pass is not the same as native MuJoCo deployment pass.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: omega=10 Hz, zeta=2, kp=I*omega^2, kd=2*I*zeta*omega, alpha=0.25*tau_max/kp, dual ankles/waist doubled.
rows.item: PD gains, armature, and action scale
rows.observed_in_current_project: Official G1 code implements armature constants, stiffness, damping, and action scale; MuJoCo final video gate is still not passed.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Export exact joint order, default pose, armature, kp, kd, action scale, ctrlrange and material into the MuJoCo runner manifest.
rows.training_impact: A mismatch in armature/kp/kd/action scale can convert real actions into unstable or underpowered motions.

rows.claim_boundary: A public-code run can be described as public-code-faithful, not necessarily exact supplementary-private-config reproduction.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Static friction U[0.3,1.6], dynamic U[0.3,1.2], restitution U[0,0.5], joint default offsets, torso COM, random root velocity pushes.
rows.observed_in_current_project: Official code matches friction/restitution/COM/push and general joint offset; supplementary text also mentions larger ankle offsets not visible in the public config.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Record whether the next teacher follows public code exactly or patches ankle offsets to the supplementary text.
rows.training_impact: This affects robustness, but it does not excuse treating failed teacher/video outputs as success.

rows.claim_boundary: Do not silently call kernel_size=1 an exact appendix adaptive-sampling reproduction.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: EMA alpha 0.001, uniform floor 0.1/S, rho=0.8, non-causal look-back u={0,1,2}.
rows.observed_in_current_project: Official public MotionCommandCfg has alpha/rho/floor, but default adaptive_kernel_size is 1 unless explicitly overridden.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: For paper-exact hard-motion training, set/verify kernel size 3 or explicitly label the run public-default.
rows.training_impact: Hard segments such as single-leg stance can remain under-sampled if pre-failure bins are not emphasized.

rows.claim_boundary: Hyperparameter alignment does not mean a checkpoint has converged.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Actor/critic [512,256,128], ELU, 24 steps/env, 30000 iterations, lr 1e-3, clip 0.2, entropy 0.005, gamma 0.99, GAE 0.95, KL 0.01, epochs 5, minibatches 4.
rows.observed_in_current_project: Official RSL-RL config matches table S4.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: If batch/env count is increased for GPU utilization, record the exact deviation and preserve all other paper constants.
rows.training_impact: Bad videos are not explained by PPO table mismatch if this official config was used; evaluate data/teacher quality next.

rows.claim_boundary: VAE MSE alone is not closed-loop success.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Encoder E(psi,e_anchor), decoder D(z,[g,V_imu,theta,theta_dot,a_last]), latent dim 32, hidden [2048,1024,512], lr 5e-4, grad accum 15, KL 0.01.
rows.item: Conditional VAE input and architecture table S5
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Only retrain paper-contract VAE after a continuous, low-fall teacher rollout dataset passes quality gates.
rows.training_impact: The old obs+action VAE can learn an averaged standing action. The corrected VAE still fails if trained on weak teacher data.

rows.claim_boundary: Current denoising MSE is diagnostic, not a paper-level control result.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Hybrid character-yaw-centric state + latent, individual state/latent denoising steps, VAE rollouts with OU action noise, 5s rejection, sagittal symmetry augmentation.
rows.observed_in_current_project: hybrid_builder=True; existing_dataset_fresh=False; teacher_raw_state=False; window_filter=False; ou_noise_code=False; five_sec_rejection=False; symmetry_aug=False.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Regenerate teacher rollout shards with raw state, then rebuild reset-safe hybrid state-latent windows with OU and symmetry manifests.
rows.training_impact: Training diffusion on old policy_obs/latent windows or reset-heavy data can produce plausible MSE but poor actions.

rows.claim_boundary: Architecture code presence is not trained-model evidence.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Horizon 16, history 4, embed 512, heads 8, layers 6, denoising steps 20, batch 512, epochs 1000, lr 1e-4, weight decay 0.001, cosine, warmup 10000, EMA 0.75/0.9999.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: After teacher/VAE/data gates pass, train the paper-contract Transformer on held-out splits and record full metrics.
rows.training_impact: A dry-run or MLP denoiser cannot explain or reproduce the paper's guided closed-loop behavior.

rows.claim_boundary: Offline guidance is not Fig.5/Fig.6 reproduction.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Use -grad G(tau) during denoising in a receding-horizon closed-loop controller; SDF relaxed barrier for obstacle tasks.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Implement and validate receding-horizon MuJoCo/Isaac closed-loop guidance only after diffusion and native adapter gates pass.
rows.training_impact: Offline guidance can improve a token cost while the robot still leans or falls in physics.

rows.claim_boundary: Reference replay can be useful visualization; it is not policy/diffusion control.
rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Closed-loop video must use controller actions through PD physics, no root assist/blending, valid material/contact and verified observation semantics.
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Do not create the final success folder until this native deployment gate passes without root assist.
rows.training_impact: This is the most direct explanation for why existing MuJoCo action-control videos are not trustworthy.

rows.expected_from_paper_or_appendix: Teacher quality and native adapter gates must pass before VAE/diffusion/guidance long training or success videos.
rows.item: No long downstream training from weak teacher
rows.required_fix_before_long_training_or_suc: Allowed next work: code/parameter fixes, numeric adapter validation, and corrective Stage-1 teacher evaluation/training under recorded contracts.
rows.training_impact: Starting downstream training now would spend GPU time learning failed teacher/controller behavior.
